'''鈭歷-m-ng-y''' ('''kavamngeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:aline|aline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aline|aline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-m-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| kavamngeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivamngeyoko|thivamngeyoko]] || [[word:jivamngeyoko|jivamngeyoko]] || [[word:shivamngeyoko|shivamngeyoko]] || [[word:kivamngeyoko|kivamngeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvamngeyoko|thuthuvamngeyoko]] || [[word:jujuvamngeyoko|jujuvamngeyoko]] || [[word:shushuvamngeyoko|shushuvamngeyoko]] || [[word:kukuvamngeyoko|kukuvamngeyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvamngeyoko|thuvamngeyoko]] || [[word:juvamngeyoko|juvamngeyoko]] || [[word:shuvamngeyoko|shuvamngeyoko]] || [[word:kuvamngeyoko|kuvamngeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vamngeyoko|th忙vamngeyoko]] || [[word:j忙vamngeyoko|j忙vamngeyoko]] || [[word:sh忙vamngeyoko|sh忙vamngeyoko]] || [[word:k忙vamngeyoko|k忙vamngeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavamngeyoko|thathavamngeyoko]] || [[word:jajavamngeyoko|jajavamngeyoko]] || [[word:shashavamngeyoko|shashavamngeyoko]] || [[word:kakavamngeyoko|kakavamngeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavamngeyoko|thavamngeyoko]] || [[word:javamngeyoko|javamngeyoko]] || [[word:shavamngeyoko|shavamngeyoko]] || [[word:kavamngeyoko|kavamngeyoko]]

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
